examples.commit_message: [rules,quality] Move module ID check top cc.bzl [rules,quality] Move module ID check top cc.bzl The module ID check was previously running as an aspect. However this can cause some problems because the aspect depends on the localtool toolchain which sometimes creates weird issues leading to inscrutable bazel error messages. With this commit, the module ID check is moved to the cc.bzl so that it runs on all binaries created by opentitan_{binary,test}. This also avoids the toolchain issue since th

examples.commit_message: [rules,quality] Move module ID check top cc.bzl [rules,quality] Move module ID check top cc.bzl The module ID check was previously running as an aspect. However this can cause some problems because the aspect depends on the localtool toolchain which sometimes creates weird issues leading to inscrutable bazel error messages. With this commit, the module ID check is moved to the cc.bzl so that it runs on all binaries created by opentitan_{binary,test}. This also avoids the toolchain issue since th
